My own experiences as a single mother, balancing work and family responsibilities, have taught me the importance of perseverance and hard work. However, I also recognize that I've been fortunate to have a supportive community and a loving family, which has contributed to my ability to succeed. Therefore, I believe that the clue 'Genius' falls somewhere in between the two extremes, acknowledging the value of both luck and hard work.

header_21.raw_response: As someone who has navigated the challenges of being a single mother and supporting my daughter's growth and development, I have learned the importance of planning and organization. I prioritize tasks, set realistic goals, and make sure to stay on track to meet deadlines. While I do experience stress and anxiety at times, I believe that having a clear understanding of deadlines helps me stay focused and motivated. Given my personal experiences and values, I think the clue 'Deadline' belongs more towards the 'Early completion' side of the spectrum.
